title: Simple Sit Animation
description: Simple Sit Animation Plugin for Paper Servers
body:
# Simple Sit Animation (Paper/Spigot/Bukkit)

A lightweight Paper/Spigot/Bukkit plugin for Minecraft 1.16.5+ that adds a simple `/sit` command to sit anywhere.

## Features

🪑 **Quick Command**: `/sit` to sit at your current location  
✅ **Vanilla-Compatible**: Works with vanilla clients (no client mods required)  
👁️ **Visible to All**: Everyone on the server can see you sitting  
🔄 **Toggle**: Use `/sit` again or press **Shift** to stand up  
🌐 **Works Everywhere**: Any Paper/Spigot/Bukkit server running 1.16.5+  
🧩 **Zero Config**: No configuration files, works out of the box  

## Usage

In chat, run: `/sit`

- **To sit**: Type `/sit` and you'll sit at your current location
- **To stand up**: Type `/sit` again or press **Shift** to dismount

Available to all players by default.

## How It Works

The plugin spawns an invisible armor stand at your location and makes you ride it. This creates an authentic sitting animation that looks exactly like sitting on slabs or stairs. The armor stand is:

- ✅ Invisible
- ✅ Has no gravity
- ✅ Invulnerable
- ✅ Automatically removed when you stand up or disconnect
